nts1.d: Down and dirty club sounds in the studio, courtesy of US/Colombian duo Solter y Sonido Sex.

Elena Colombi helps to keep nights weird - expect a diverse range of up-and-at-'em records: from techno to post-punk, through EBM, industrial and -wave…
From the host: "LIVE AT SOUP MANCHESTER…excerpt recording of a special night ~ I hope you enjoy it!! <3"

nts1.n: The Kronicles w/ DJ Amir: Summer Vibes
THE EARLY BIRD SHOW W/ SPIRIT BLUE
THE NTS BREAKFAST SHOW W/ FLO & LEAO (LIVE)
SOUP TO NUTS W/ SHY ONE
ERROL & ALEX RITA PRESENT TOUCHING BASS

nts2.d: Ahwlee & Pink Siifu (B. Cool-Aid) head up BRWN, exploring hip hop's varied and far-reaching experimental corners - live once a month from Los Angeles.

West Coast Fog with Erik Bluhm, broadcasts monthly from far-flung natural environments, bringing along site specific, privately released meditational music from past decades for a deeply involved sensory experience.
From the host:_ "In which West Coast Fog and a dog venture into the depths of a remote canyon; wade through a boulder-strewn stream; encounter wildlife; and get be-nighted all the while listening to older music that felt appropriate at the time on a Sports Walkman."_

nts2.n: RVNG Intl. Presents Friends & Fiends w/ Discovery Zone
Blooming in Filth w/ Ali Michael (Whorseteeth)
Through the Ground Floor Window w/ Abdullah Miniawy
KOKONUT TRIP w/ TIM KOH & Sun An

subtle.d: Hailing from northern Italy, STANDARD is a collective of artists, DJs and producers that aims at the promotion of bass music: Garage, UK Funky, Breaks, Leftfield Bass, Leftfield Techno, Dubstep, everything in between and beyond. They focus on the Italian Bass scene, showcasing new up-and-coming artists as well as established talents from all over the peninsula.

Oddkut is a producer & DJ hailing from Balakovo City, Russia. He's part of the Russian collective "United Gang" who are a Moscow-based community of local musicians, DJ's and promoters teamed up by their genuine love & interest in UK underground music, "TAЭT VREMYA" art group and the creator of the Moscow parties "Judder".

Kishan is a DJ and Producer currently based in London. Actively involved in the music scene already, he produces and mixes a wide range of genres including UK Garage, Drum & Bass, House, Disco and Afrobeat.

subtle.n: The Watercourse Way w/ Jamie Nu
Stepfwd w/ Dub Hustle & Death Trap

dublab.n: Echo Park Film Center - Optical Track
Jennifer Herrema and Kurt Midness - The Banana Question

dublab.d: “Dying Songs focuses on melancholic electronic music but isn’t limited to that. Sometimes it gets dark, sometimes I try to mix techno awkwardly, sometimes i get nostalgic… I like stuff that’s dreamy, ghostly, pretty and sad. I’ll try out new productions of my own, as well. I’m keeping it pretty open and we’ll see how it evolves.” – Jimmy

dublab.n: George Jensen and Heavy Hymns - Quietudes
Daddy Differently and Dirty Dave - Things of Life
dublab.d: It’s the simple things isn’t it? The little things of life. Good food, sunshine, no traffic, dark coffee, 72˚ breeze, telephone off the hook and music every Friday morning a la Daddy Differently & Dirty Dave.

dublab.n: Thalma de Freitas – THALMA PLAYS BRASIL
Protect Me – PROPRO’s HIP-HOP PUNK HOUSE
